user.title: Connect to Jooki
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Jooki device.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of your Jooki
data_description.name: Friendly name for this Jooki device
data_description.device_version: Select the hardware model of your Jooki player (J1000 = original, J2000 = second generation)

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Jooki MQTT broker. Check the host and port.

abort.already_configured: This Jooki device is already configured.
